step_rationale: Carbohydrate; systemic metabolic marker; off-pathway metabolic risk.
mechanism: D-Fructose is a carbohydrate metabolite associated with coronary artery disease via systemic metabolic dysregulation and glucose homeostasis.

references.title: Plasma Metabolic Profiling and Multiclass Diagnostic Model Development for Stable Angina Pectoris and Acute Myocardial Infarction.
